char_overview: Veteran whose 灵力 awakening fractured into an obsession with killing as art, each scene deliberately staged.
char_looks: 178cm Light brown curly hair Weathered face, red eyes. Tailcoat with left shoulder armor, trousers with left knee armor, black leather shoes. 轻语, Four-shot revolver, can be converted to sniper rifle with barrel, stock, and scope.
char_flaws: Explosions trigger flashbacks; An old left calf scar limits running.; Names each shot like a stage announcer.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-绽放: Constructs bullets from 灵力. Upon impact, they bloom like flowers from within the target, causing internal pain beyond the physical wound.
char_mission: Continues killing his way, each scene deliberately arranged.
char_origin: Military veteran whose battlefield trauma after discharge spiraled into mental breakdown, triggering 灵力 awakening, frames killing as art: each murder a carefully composed piece. The ambush that blinded 慎 was his orchestration.

char_relationships.炼司: The only gunsmith he trusts, built 轻语 for him. The only name scratched out in the ledger.
char_relationships.慎: The 狩灵 he blinded in an orchestrated ambush, a work he considers incomplete: the man still moves, still hunts, still refuses to break.
char_relationships.劫: Ambushed in the same incident, watches her hunt him across prefectures with detached curiosity, her escalating desperation holding his attention.
